task0.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 dataset for Singapore during Summer 2017, focusing on a wide area.

task1.objective: Run the Swin-L detector on the xView1 images to detect Oil Tankers, Ferries, and Sailboats.

task2.objective: Analyze detection counts from the Swin-L detector to determine which category (Oil Tanker, Ferry, Sailboat) has the highest count in the analyzed area.
